name: Carrot Salad (Satterly)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, combine the shredded carrots with chopped fresh parsley.
2. Add basil and scallions to the bowl.
3. Drizzle lemon juice over the mixture.
4. Pour safflower oil into the bowl and stir until well combined.
5. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
6. Toss gently to distribute ingredients evenly.
7. Serve immediately.
